mapper.insert: INSERT INTO invites (workspace_id, email, role, token_hash, expires_at, created_by) VALUES (#{workspaceId}, #{email}, #{role}, #{tokenHash}, #{expiresAt}, #{createdBy})
mapper.select: SELECT id, workspace_id AS workspaceId, email, role FROM invites WHERE token_hash = #{tokenHash} AND used_at IS NULL AND expires_at > NOW(6) LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE invites SET used_at = NOW(6) WHERE id = #{id} AND used_at IS NULL
